info.title: ddashboard REST — dls/v1
info.description: Hand-maintained catalogue of browser-facing routes. Base path: `{site}/wp-json/dls/v1`. Authenticate with WordPress cookies + `X-WP-Nonce` (see localized `stella_options.nonce`). Update this file when changing `inc/routes/*.php`.

WPCookieAuth.name: X-WP-Nonce
WPCookieAuth.description: WordPress REST API nonce for logged-in user; send with Cookie auth.

200.description: OK (JSON or binary; see route implementation in theme)
